summary: Plan-only assessment for PR #81157. The PR is small, non-security, mergeable, and maintainer-editable, but it is not merge-ready because required merge preflight is incomplete: one behavior-proof check is failing, PR comments were not hydrated, no review-bot comment hydration is available, and no Codex /review proof is present. Recommend repairing the contributor branch before merge consideration.

actions.reason: Repair and complete proof/review gates before any merge recommendation.
Produce an executable repair plan for the existing contributor PR branch.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #81157 on the contributor branch by completing the missing validation and review gates for the process tool action validation fix. Do not replace the branch unless repair proves impossible; preserve adone0 as the source contributor.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): reject invalid process.action at the tool invocation boundary
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair/finalization plan for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260618T170451-024.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/81157
Contributor credit: Thanks @adone0 for the original fix; this path preserves attribution while completing the remaining validation gates.

Scope:
- Keep the runtime guard for invalid process.action values in src/agents/bash-tools.process.ts.
- Keep or adjust the focused malformed-action tests in src/agents/bash-tools.test.ts.
- Hydrate and address any human or review-bot comments before merge consideration.
- Recover the failing Real behavior proof gate or document the exact non-code proof blocker.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/bash-tools.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review clean before merge preflight.
